FINDING: metricsService.ts:3:SHOULD-FIX
WHAT: `overallAvgTat` denominator is `months.length` not the count of months with data; one-month-of-data case shows wrong average
EVIDENCE: metricsService.ts:3
IMPACT: dashboard shows stale or misleading averages
OPTIONS:
1. divide by months.filter((m) => m.avgTat > 0).length
UNVERIFIABLE: no
